name: Fleet Management
description: Vehicle tracking, driver management, maintenance scheduling, trip logging, and compliance

terminology.vehicle: A fleet asset with make, model, year, VIN, license plate, mileage, and status (active, maintenance, retired)
terminology.driver: A certified operator assigned to vehicles with license info, certifications, and driving record
terminology.trip: A vehicle journey with start/end locations, distance, duration, fuel usage, and purpose
terminology.maintenance: Scheduled or unscheduled vehicle service — oil change, tire rotation, brake inspection, etc.
terminology.compliance: Regulatory requirements: vehicle inspections, driver certifications, hours of service, insurance

common_queries: Which vehicles are due for maintenance?
Show me all trips for truck VIN 1234 this week
What's the total fuel cost this month?
What's the average cost per mile for each vehicle?
Show me the fleet utilization rate

example_interactions.assistant: Truck #47 (2022 Ford F-150, VIN ending 8923) is due for its 50,000-mile service. I'll schedule an oil change, tire rotation, and brake inspection. Preferred date and service center?

5 drivers are available tomorrow:
- Mike Johnson (Class A CDL, no trips scheduled)
- Sarah Williams (Class B CDL, available after 2pm)
- David Chen (Class A CDL, full day available)
- Lisa Park (Class C, morning only)
- James Brown (Class A CDL, full day available)

example_interactions.user: Add a new vehicle to the fleet
example_interactions.assistant: I'll add a new vehicle. Please provide: make, model, year, VIN, license plate, and assigned location. I'll set up the maintenance schedule based on manufacturer recommendations.
